nodes.name: Loss Functions
nodes.description: Loss function primitives from DSB 2017 1st-place solution: miss-penalty loss for hard positive examples

nodes.name: miss_penalty_loss
nodes.description: Negative log-likelihood penalty for positive examples predicted below a confidence threshold
nodes.type_signature: (predictions: NDArray[np.float64], labels: NDArray[np.float64], threshold: float = 0.03) -> float
